description: Validator for the doorman callflow data object

call_timeout.description: How long to ring the callee

caller_greeting.default: Hi. Please state your name after the tone.
caller_greeting.description: Greeting played to caller to inform her/him about name/purpose recording

caller_id_name.description: Custom Caller ID Name to denote the doorman is calling

failover_strategy.description: The failover strategy to use if the callee does not answer or hangs up without choosing an option

id.description: The KAZOO device or user ID

max_menu_attempts.description: The max number of doorman menu repetitions in case of callee's wrong choice

origin.description: Read-only setting if the call is recorded

recording_limit.description: The caller's recording limit for name and reason for calling

skip_module.description: When set to true this callflow action is skipped, advancing to the wildcard branch (if any)

tones.description: Ring tone to play to the caller after recording their name

vmbox_id.description: Voicemail box ID to send caller to if callee choses
